sections.paragraph:
Ἐλιούδ, ὁ indecl. Eliud, in the genealogy of Jesus Mt 1:14f; Lk 3:23ff D.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 317
